title: lagenaria siceraria var. hispida
intro: Lagenaria siceraria var. hispida, also known as the calabash or horned melon, is a type of vining plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant's fruit has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The calabash fruit has been reported to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and providing antioxidant properties. The fruit can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also consumed raw or cooked in various dishes.
